plugins.name: claude-core
plugins.description: Foundation plugin — tracing, memory governance, CLAUDE.md protection. Required by all other plugins.

plugins.name: dev-engine
plugins.description: Generic development execution — task decomposition, agent dispatch, tier-based model assignment, completion gates, and visual verification.

plugins.name: taskflow
plugins.description: Task management and workplace integration — Jira ingestion, local task storage, contradiction detection, project profiles, and QA handover.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Visual design toolkit — interprets brand strategy into concrete visual systems: color palettes, typography, spacing, design tokens.
